hero.eyebrow: A small workshop · Made by hand · Delivered to Berlin
hero.headline: About twenty tables a year.
hero.subheadline: We're Jan and Tomas — two brothers, one workshop. Every solid wood table on this site was planned, cut and finished by us, for someone's specific space. No franchise. No mass production. Just the work.
hero.liveCountText: tables in the workshop right now

makers.title: Jan and Tomas.
body: We've been working with wood our whole lives — Jan came to it through furniture design, Tomas through carpentry. A few years ago we set up the workshop together, and started building solid wood tables to order.

Every table on this site was planned, cut, glued, sanded and finished by us. No subcontracting. No warehouse of stock. We start with a slab, take notes as we go, and finish with a piece that fits a specific room.
Each table is signed underneath. If you bring it back to us in twenty years for a fresh coat of oil, we'll remember it.
makers.imageCaption: Live-edge slab in the workshop — three weeks from finished

featured.title: Selected pieces
featured.subtitle: A selection of our current tables — available, in production, or already sold as inspiration.

categories.title: What we build
categories.subtitle: Seven table types. Every single one built to your dimensions, wishes, and space.

coffee.title: Coffee tables
coffee.desc: Compact solid wood tables for living rooms, apartments and lounge areas. Available with straight edge, live edge or subtle resin detail.

dining.title: Dining tables
dining.desc: Made-to-order solid wood dining tables for homes, apartments and meeting rooms. Size, edge, base and finish are agreed before production.

bistro.title: Bistro & kitchen tables
bistro.desc: Round and compact tables for kitchens, small dining areas, cafés and terraces. Built for spaces where every centimeter matters.

desk.title: Desks
desk.desc: Solid wood desks for home offices, studios or workspaces. Sturdy, ergonomic, built to last.

business.title: Cafe, office & restaurant tables
business.desc: Tables for commercial spaces: matching batches, durable matte finishes and a clear process before production starts.

newsletter.title: Stay in the loop
newsletter.subtitle: About once a month: new pieces, wood characters, and workshop notes. No marketing.

cookies.message: We only use one essential cookie to remember your language preference. No tracking cookies.

inspiration.title: Pieces already living with customers.
inspiration.subtitle: Sold tables become inspiration. We never build two identical pieces — but we build similar ones.

care.title: How to keep your table for a lifetime.
care.subtitle: Solid wood lives and moves. It wants to be cared for — not sealed. Here's everything you need to know.

items.title: Daily
items.desc: Wipe with a soft, slightly damp cloth. Dry-wipe afterwards. No harsh cleaners.

items.title: Monthly
items.desc: Apply a thin coat of care oil. Rub in circular motions, let absorb, wipe off.

items.title: If needed
items.desc: Lightly sand scratches, apply oil. We're happy to send a care kit with your order.

filters.noResults: No pieces found. Try a different filter.

items.quote: The table turned out exactly how we imagined it — and looks even better in the space than in the photos.
items.name: Anna K.

items.quote: Clear communication, quick delivery, perfect craft. We ordered 12 tables for our café and couldn't be happier.
items.name: Café Felix

items.quote: Every detail of the custom order was considered. The table fits our kitchen to the millimeter.
items.name: Brandt family

workshop.title: This is where your table is made.
workshop.subtitle: No mass production, no franchise chain. Every table is planned, cut, sanded and finished in our workshop — by hand.

materials.title: Woods we work with
materials.subtitle: We pick every piece of wood with intent — from where it grew to how it's sanded. Here's a quick look at the woods we use most often.

items.name: Oak
items.character: Robust, warm-light, classic. The all-rounder for dining and conference tables.

items.name: Walnut
items.character: Deep chocolate-brown with lively grain. Premium look, ideal for living and coffee tables.

items.name: Ash
items.character: Light, clear, pronounced grain. Modern, airy, desk-friendly.

items.name: Beech
items.character: Creamy-pink tone, calm grain. Very stable, ideal for kitchen tables.

process.title: From first conversation to finished table
process.subtitle: Four clear steps. No surprises.
process.time: Usually 2–4 weeks, depending on size, wood and finish.

step1.title: Send your inquiry
step1.desc: Dimensions, preferred wood, reference photos. By form or WhatsApp.

step2.title: Recommendation & quote
step2.desc: We suggest proportions, wood and base, then send a fixed-price quote.

step3.title: Built in the workshop
step3.desc: Your table is built in our workshop — by hand, with care.

step4.title: Delivery or pickup
step4.desc: We deliver to Berlin and across Germany, or arrange pickup.

b2b.title: Tables for cafés, offices and restaurants.
b2b.subtitle: Matching batches, durable matte surfaces, predictable production. We work with hospitality, interior designers and companies across Germany.
b2b.batchText: Up to 30 matching tables in a single batch.
b2b.differenceTitle: Four things that make the difference for businesses.

benefits.title: Matching batches
benefits.desc: Multiple tables from the same wood batch, consistent dimensions and identical finish.

benefits.title: Durable matte surfaces
benefits.desc: Hard wax oil finish: built for daily use, easy to repair, no high-gloss.

benefits.title: Predictable production
benefits.desc: Clear deadlines, coordinated delivery, planned around renovation or opening.

benefits.title: Direct contact
benefits.desc: You speak directly with the workshop. No middlemen, no franchise.

items.a: Usually 2–4 weeks, depending on size, wood, base and current workload.
Yes. Berlin is our primary delivery area. Delivery to other German cities can be arranged depending on the piece.
Yes. Most tables are made to measure. Send us your space, preferred size and reference images — we'll suggest fitting proportions.

items.q: Does the table need to have epoxy resin?
items.a: No. Resin details are optional. Many tables can be made without any resin at all.

items.q: Can I order a similar table to a sold one?
items.a: Yes — sold pieces work as inspiration. The wood grain and details will never be identical, but a similar table is possible.

items.q: Can I order multiple tables for a café, office or restaurant?
items.a: Yes. We can plan matching batches or multiple sizes for businesses.

finalCta.title: Ready to plan your table?
finalCta.subtitle: Send us dimensions, your space and references. We usually reply within one business day.
